alerts.title: Conntour raises $7M from General Catalyst, YC to build an AI search engine for security video systems
alerts.description: Conntour uses AI models to let security teams query camera feeds using natural language to find any object, person, or situation.

alerts.title: Mercor competitor Deccan AI raises $25M, sources experts from India
alerts.description: Deccan AI concentrates its workforce in India to manage quality in a fast-growing but fragmented AI training market.

alerts.title: AI Legal Platform Startup Reaches $11B Valuation
alerts.description: The rapid growth of legal AI was underscored by a decline in legal data provider stocks after Anthropic's recent release of a legal plugin for its Cowork agent system.

alerts.title: Tencent to Double AI Spending to More Than $5B Over Next Year
alerts.description: The vendor is getting into the fast-growing AI personal agent market.

alerts.title: French AI Startup Building World Models Raises $1.03 billion
alerts.description: World models are gaining popularity quickly as developers seek new ways to train generative AI models.

alerts.title: Intercom's new post-trained Fin Apex 1.0 beats GPT-5.4 and Claude Sonnet 4.6 at customer service resolutions
alerts.description:
Intercom is taking an unusual gamble for a legacy software company: building its own AI model.
